channel.title: flove making-of — cross-links questions
channel.description: New cross-links design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should cross-links be typed or untyped?
item.description:
• Typed — Defined relationship types (responds_to, derived_from). Richer querying, more schema. • Untyped — Simple hyperlinks. Simpler, less metadata, still useful. • Hybrid — Untyped by default, optional type annotation. Flexible.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Untyped
